trigger: Ken operational brief — S1-S7 compliance required before P2

S1.name: OpenClaw Version Currency
S1.finding: Version 2026.4.24 exceeds minimum requirement 2026.1.29. CVE-2026-25253 patch confirmed covered.

S2.name: Gateway Loopback Binding
S2.finding: Gateway correctly bound to loopback. Port 18789 not externally exposed.

S3.name: ClawHub Skill Audit
S3.found: All skills are openclaw-bundled, openclaw-extra, or workspace-custom. No clawhub source detected.
S3.finding: 22 skills ready. Sources: openclaw-bundled, openclaw-extra, workspace custom. No ClawHub installs.

S4.name: Least Privilege Per Agent
S4.required: Each agent scoped to minimum tools; governance agents read-only
S4.found: All 6 agents (main, business, security, legal, qa, governance) have tools=null in openclaw.json
S4.finding: Agent tool scopes not explicitly configured. null may mean inheriting defaults rather than least-privilege enforcement. Cannot confirm governance agents are read-only from config alone.
S4.action: Define explicit tool scopes per agent in openclaw.json. Governance agents (Shield, Lex, Sage, Warden) must be read-only filesystem. Raise CHG before P2 client onboarding.

S5.name: No Hardcoded Credentials
S5.required: Zero plaintext secrets in workspace files
S5.found: grep scan of scripts/, *.md, *.json returned 0 matches for sk-ant-, Bearer, apiKey patterns
S5.finding: No hardcoded credentials detected in workspace scripts or markdown files.

S6.name: Audit Trail Current
S6.required: All changes in CHANGELOG.md; incident-log.json as list with all incidents
S6.found: CHANGELOG.md exists (last modified 2026-05-01 19:03). incident-log.json exists but is dict format, not list.
S6.finding: CHANGELOG active and current. incident-log.json format is dict (not list) — may indicate structural issue or single-entry wrapping. Needs review to confirm all incidents are captured.
S6.action: Review state/incident-log.json structure. If incidents are missing or format incorrect, remediate and raise CHG. Confirm Warden model compliance checks current.

S7.name: Data Encryption at Rest
S7.finding: macOS FileVault enabled on OC1. Obsidian vault on encrypted volume. NAS encryption deferred — OC2 not yet arrived.
S7.action: When OC2 arrives (TRIGGER-01), ensure NAS encrypted before connecting shared model weights.

immediate_actions.action: Define explicit per-agent tool scopes in openclaw.json. Governance agents must be read-only. Raise CHG before first P2 client onboarding.
Review state/incident-log.json — confirm all incidents captured; fix format if needed.

notes: No critical failures. System is pre-P2 ready with 2 WARNs requiring remediation before first client. OpenClaw version well ahead of minimum. Gateway correctly secured.
